name: open-autopose-api
description: tp.job/v1 contract, CLI, MCP server, and REST gateway for Open AutoPose
comment_type: Left as commonjs on purpose: tp-spec.js is a UMD/CommonJS file (require + module.exports). The CLI/MCP/runner/server use explicit .mjs extensions, so they are ES modules regardless of this field.

scripts.test: node --test tests/spec.test.mjs tests/chunking.test.mjs tests/plugins.test.mjs tests/gateway.test.mjs tests/frames.test.mjs tests/release.test.mjs
